MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. ROBERT N. FISHER, Esq. of Bradley/Grombacher, LLP (Tel: 805-270-7100) for plaintiff;
Atty. ERIN E. MEYER, Esq. of Keker, Van Nest & Peters LLP (Tel: 415-676 2252) for defendant Maplebear Inc. dba Instacart.

HEARING RE: DEFENDANT MAPLEBEAR INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And To Stay.

Matter argued and submitted. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. Defendant Maplebear dba Instacart's motion to compel arbitration and stay proceedings is granted. (See Word minutes for complete ruling.)

Order signed.
